description: You are a Clinical Data Manager for the Phase II Diabetes Trial (DM-TRIAL-2024). Using the credentials root / Admin123!, restore the removed 'Month 3 Follow-up' event for subject DM-105 and schedule the 'Month 6 Follow-up' event for the same subject with a Start Date of 2024-06-01. To maintain GCP compliance, add a Discrepancy Note of type 'Annotation' to DM-105's subject record with the description: 'Restored Month 3 event per sponsor'.
